name: ruby-http-parser.rb
title: ruby-http-parser.rb
description:
Simple callback-based HTTP request/response parser
A simple callback-based HTTP request/response parser for writing http servers,
clients and proxies.
.
It is built on top of Joyent's libhttp-parser and it's Java port.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-http-parser.rb because Simple callback-based HTTP request/response parser.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-http-parser.rb as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-http-parser.rb with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-http-parser.rb --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
